# Load Configuration Fields → Rounding Mode Bits

*Auto-generated from CEVA-XC4500 Vec-C Intrinsics documentation*

---

Main table → Load Configuration Fields → Rounding Mode Bits

Rounding Mode Bits

Instruction Type and Width                   Instruction description
Vector Automatic Rounding                    Sets the Vector Automatic Rounding bit field.
Vector Double-Word Multiplication Product    Sets the Rounding Constant Shift Value for Vector Double-Word
Rounding - Rounding Constant Shift Value     Multiplication Product Rounding.
Vector Double-Word Multiplication Product    Sets the Rounding Set bits for Vector Double-Word

Rounding - Rounding Set                      Multiplication Product Rounding.
Vector Double-Word Multiplication Product    Sets the valid bit for Vector Double-Word Multiplication Product
Rounding - Valid Bit                         Rounding.
Vector Long Double-Word Multiplication
                                             Sets the Rounding Constant Shift Value for Vector Long Double-
Product Rounding - Rounding Constant Shift
                                             Word Multiplication Product Rounding.
Value
Vector Long Double-Word Multiplication       Sets the Rounding Set bits for Vector Long Double-Word
Product Rounding - Rounding Set              Multiplication Product Rounding.
Vector Long Double-Word Multiplication       Sets the valid bit for Vector Long Double-Word Multiplication
Product Rounding - Valid Bit                 Product Rounding.
Vector Split Two-Word Multiplication Product Sets the Rounding Constant Shift Value for Vector Split Two-
Rounding - Rounding Constant Shift Value     Word Multiplication Product Rounding.
Vector Split Two-Word Multiplication Product Sets the Rounding Set bits for Vector Split Two-Word
Rounding - Rounding Set                      Multiplication Product Rounding.
Vector Split Two-Word Multiplication Product Sets the valid bit for Vector Split Two-Word Multiplication
Rounding - Valid Bit                         Product Rounding.
